title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 643.255 - Cities, counties, state agencies, requirements
text:
643.255.  Cities, counties, state agencies, requirements. — 1.  No state agency or political subdivision of this state shall accept a bid in connection with any asbestos abatement project that does not fully comply with the provisions of sections 643.225 to 643.250.
  2.  No state agency or political subdivision of this state shall carry out any asbestos abatement project using its own employees except in compliance with the requirements of sections 643.225 to 643.250.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1394 § 4, A.L. 1989 H.B. 77, et al.) 
Effective 6-13-89
